mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate, directly lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, driving corporate earnings revisions upward and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with declining housing starts signals a rotation from construction to manufacturing, boosting corporate profit margins and yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC of the INDPRO-HOUST spread falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns do not differ significantly between positive and negative spread regimes.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of accelerating real GDP growth, rising consumer credit balances amplify consumption demand, lifting equity cash flows and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns in high-GDP-growth periods are not statistically greater than baseline (p > 0.05), or the signal produces negative returns in > 50% of triggered windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls signals robust economic momentum, supporting corporate revenue expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns show no significant difference between positive and negative payroll growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index rises above 3.0% year-over-year, inflation expectations trigger central bank hawkishness, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of instances where YoY inflation exceeds 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising housing starts and stable federal funds rates indicates accommodative financial conditions supporting real estate and construction equities, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a random baseline by at least 0.05 Rank IC over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns are not significantly higher when HOUST rises and FEDFUNDS remains flat.

mechanism_narrative: During supply chain normalization phases, rising industrial production without corresponding inflation spikes signals improved capacity utilization, boosting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 0.5% MoM while CPIAUCSL MoM < 0.2%
failure_condition: Forward returns do not differ significantly between triggered and non-triggered periods, or the signal produces negative returns in > 55% of instances.
